title: Skyworks Aeronautics Establishes South African Distribution Partner and Adds Another 15 Hawk 5 Gyroplanes to Its Growing Order Book
text: Chicago, Illinois--(Newsfile Corp. - November 30, 2023) - Skyworks Aeronautics Corp. ("Skyworks"), the global leader in gyronautics, announced that it has signed a sales and marketing distribution agreement with South African-based Classique Aviation. The distribution agreement covers the sales territory of the country of South Africa for Skyworks' Hawk 5 Gyroplane.

title: Tech With Benefits: 7 Stocks Offering Growth and Passive Income
text: While innovation typically coincides exclusively with a growth-centric business model, that's not always the case as these tech stocks to buy for growth and passive income demonstrates. With this category, investors can have their cake and eat it too.

title: 3 AI Stocks Set to Dominate the Market by 2025

title: Bear of the Day: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS)
text: Given the poor price performance of Skyworks (SWKS) stock over the last few years the large decline in annual earnings estimates in the last 30 days is concerning.

title: Investing In Skyworks: A Smart Move For Those Eyeing Growth And Value
text: Skyworks Solutions is a leading RF manufacturer positioned to take advantage of growth in the 5G market. The company's focus on broad markets, including IoT and automotive applications, offers potential for diversification away from the maturing smartphone market. While the company's recent earnings report was lackluster, its strong free cash flow and sound balance sheet provide stability and potential for future growth.

title: Apple Sales Are in Decline, but 1 Other Stock Is Taking It on the Chin
text: Skyworks Solutions has been hit hard from a downturn in Apple product sales, and it's still struggling to diversify its business. Shares could be really cheap, but there's not much in the way of forward-looking growth expectations either.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio: Year One Is On The Books
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF, with a few minor twists. The portfolio fell by 3.07% in October, underperforming the S&P 500 by 0.97%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 3.61%.

title: Skyworks' (SWKS) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Down Y/Y
text: Skyworks' (SWKS) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 results reflect the negative impact of high inventory levels in the broad market amid a challenging macroeconomic environment.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For November 2023
text: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF posted its third consecutive losing month in October, the first time this has happened since I started tracking this series in September 2020. The top 15 dividend growth stocks for November offer an average dividend yield of 1.90% and appear to be about 40% undervalued based on dividend yield theory. Since inception, September 2020, the watchlist is outperforming VIG by 1.49% and SPY by 1.18%, on an annualized basis.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For November 2023
text: The market slide continues in October with the SPDR S&P 500 Trust ETF dropping by 2.17%, marking three consecutive months of losses for the fund. The top 10 stocks on the watchlist for November 2023 offer a 4.58% dividend yield, more than double the S&P 500.
